content.claim: Currently 4,900 special-education/conductor-role teachers work in general schools, plus 949 developmental teachers and 1,404 specialists in the traveling special-education-teacher and conductor network (approximately 7,253 total specialist positions nationally).
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: No source provides a systematic national specialist-to-pupil ratio analysis relative to the 69,000–120,000 identified SNI population, making workforce adequacy an open question
Practitioner accounts report strain and staff departures, but these are not quantified against the total workforce or caseload growth rate
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
